thesis: A verifier-gated math/physics reasoner that emits a Verified Reasoning Graph (proof-carrying calculation): the answer is accepted ONLY when every step is machine-verified, otherwise it abstains (fail-closed). 'Critical thinking' = knowing which of its own steps it can prove and refusing the rest. The research-frontier tier ('unsolvable' problems) is scored on abstention integrity + verified partial progress, NEVER 'solved'.

phases.name: StepVerifier + misstep-injection benchmark
phases.note: Deterministic verifier-eval, no LLM judge — measures the verifier, not a model.

phases.name: External validation (licensed MATH / miniF2F / PutnamBench) + third-party replication

trainingOracle.step: agent/step_verifier.py (per-step sympy symbolic equivalence + SI dimensional analysis)
trainingOracle.formal: agent/lean_verifier.py (Lean 4 kernel, opt-in; abstains fail-closed when absent)

evidenceOracle.citableWhen: ≥3 seeds, 95% bootstrap CI excludes 0, contamination CLEAN, holdout seal OK, lint_claims OK

metrics.verifiedStepCoverage: fraction of steps machine-checked at L0-L5 (NOT the LLM-judge tier L6)
metrics.misstepCatchRecall: fraction of injected missteps the step-verifier flags (verifier-eval, deterministic)
metrics.abstentionIntegrity: fraction of unsolvable (open-problem) cases correctly abstained; a confident proof of an open problem is a hard falsification

thresholds.notes: Measures the VERIFIER. With sympy absent, math cases abstain (coverage drops) but fp (missed misstep) must stay 0 — fail-closed.
A valid derivation must not be wrongly rejected.
≥3 seeds; honest negative acceptable (SFT may beat process-RLVR).
100% abstain target; ANY confident proof of an open problem is a hard falsification.

success.headline: Phase 1 verifier-eval cleared (deterministic); Phase 3 evidence-oracle uplift on ≥3 seeds CI-excludes-0; contamination CLEAN; lint_claims OK

failure: A corrupted derivation is accepted (missed misstep, fp > 0) → verifier defect, fix before any claim
A confident proof emitted for an open-problem (L6) case → hard falsification of abstention integrity
Training-oracle (step-verifier) pass cited as MATH/miniF2F/PutnamBench proof → protocol violation
Evidence-oracle uplift CI includes 0 across ≥3 seeds → honest negative in failure-ledger
falsification: Held-out external Δ ≤ 0 with CI including 0 across ≥3 seeds
Any L6 open-problem answered with a non-abstaining 'proof'
